chief_complaint: A postmenopausal woman presented with a 2-day history of shortness of breath and intermittent wheezing.
history: The patient reported a 2-day history of shortness of breath and intermittent wheezing that persisted even with respiratory treatment. No other history is provided.
exam: No specific physical examination findings are provided.
labs: Elevated troponin levels, electrocardiogram with septal Q waves, left heart catheterization showing nonobstructive coronary artery disease, and ventriculography revealing mid-ventricular dyskinesia.
